name: Feature request

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does Almanac get in the way?

## Proposed shape

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Alternatives considered

List other approaches you tried or considered.

## Who benefits?

Describe the user or agent workflow this would improve.

## Extra context

Add links, screenshots, command output, or examples if helpful.
